Your available tools:
- alarm.countdown: Create a countdown alarm. Args: title, durationSeconds.
- calendar.create: Add an event to your calendar. Args: title, startsInMinutes.
- calendar.list: Read upcoming calendar events. Args: none.
- contacts.search: Find a contact by name. Args: query. Only use for the user's address book, not web people search.
- location.current: Get the user's current GPS location. Args: none. Use before nearby/local map searches when location context is needed.
- mail.draft: Compose an email draft using the system mail composer. Args: to or recipient or email, subject, body or message or text.
- maps.directions: Open Apple Maps directions to a real destination. Args: destination. Use only for navigation/route requests.
- maps.search: Find nearby/local places in Apple Maps. Args: query. Use only for local places like coffee near me, pharmacy nearby, closest hardware store, addresses, or directions. Do not use for DIY, tutorials, research, articles, or general web search.
- memory.recall: Search stored memories about the user. Args: query. Not for web search.
- memory.save: Store a user fact or preference for future recall. Args: content, kind.
- outlook.draft.create: Create a saved Outlook draft through Microsoft Graph. Args: to, subject, body.
- outlook.mail.send: Send an Outlook email through Microsoft Graph. Args: to, subject, body. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.messages.search: Search Outlook mail with Microsoft Graph. Args: query, optional folder/folderId, limit.
- phone.call: Open the phone dialer for a number. Args: number. Never use for general lookup.
- photos.search: Search the user's photo library by date/category terms. Args: query. Not for web image search.
- rag.search: Semantic search across indexed local files, PDFs, notes, and photo metadata. Args: query, optional limit. Not for internet search.
- reminders.create: Create a new reminder. Args: title.
- trigger.create: Schedule a background agent run. Args: title, prompt, schedule, plus inMinutes/atTime/intervalSeconds/beforeMinutes depending on schedule.
- web.fetch: Fetch and read a specific web page. Args: url. Use only when the user gives a URL or a prior web search returns one to inspect.
- web.search: Search the web for general knowledge, fresh information, tutorials, DIY guides, plans, research, articles, or documentation. Args: query. Use this for `search for ...` unless the user explicitly wants nearby/local places.

Your available tools:
- alarm.authorization_status: Check AlarmKit authorization state. Args: none.
- alarm.cancel: Cancel a scheduled alarm. Args: id UUID or title fallback.
- alarm.list: List active AlarmKit alarms. Args: none.
- alarm.pause: Pause an alarm. Args: id UUID.
- alarm.request_authorization: Request permission to use AlarmKit alarms. Args: none.
- alarm.resume: Resume a paused alarm. Args: id UUID.
- alarm.schedule: Schedule an AlarmKit alarm. Args: title, inMinutes or timestamp, optional repeats, snoozeMinutes.
- alarm.snooze: Snooze an alerting alarm. Args: id UUID.
- alarm.stop: Stop an alerting alarm. Args: id UUID.
- camera.capture: Take a photo with the device camera. Args: none.
- files.read: Read a previously imported local document by name. Args: name. Do not use for attached files already visible in the current prompt.
- health.summary: Read steps, sleep, heart rate, energy, and distance. Args: none.
- messages.draft: Compose an iMessage/SMS draft. Args: to or recipient or number, body or message or text.
- motion.activity: Detect recent device motion activity such as walking/running. Args: none.
- outlook.attachments.list: List attachment metadata for one Outlook message. Args: messageId or id.
- outlook.folders.list: List Outlook/Hotmail mail folders with unread and total counts. Args: optional includeHidden true/false.
- outlook.message.archive: Move an Outlook message to Archive. Args: messageId or id. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.delete: Delete an Outlook message. Args: messageId or id. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.forward: Forward an Outlook message. Args: messageId or id, to, optional body/comment. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.mark_read: Mark an Outlook message as read. Args: messageId or id. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.mark_unread: Mark an Outlook message as unread. Args: messageId or id. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.move: Move an Outlook message to a folder. Args: messageId or id, destination or destinationId. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.read: Read one Outlook message body by id. Args: messageId or id.
- outlook.message.reply: Reply to an Outlook message. Args: messageId or id, body/comment. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.message.reply_all: Reply-all to an Outlook message. Args: messageId or id, body/comment. Requires explicit approval.
- outlook.messages.list: List recent Outlook messages. Args: optional folder or folderId, limit, unreadOnly.
- outlook.status: Check whether the Microsoft Graph Outlook account is signed in. Args: none.
- rag.index_files: Rebuild the index for imported files and PDFs. Args: none.
- rag.index_photos: Rebuild the monthly photo metadata index. Args: months.
- reminders.list: Read pending reminders. Args: none.
- trigger.cancel: Cancel a scheduled agent run. Args: title or id.
- trigger.list: Show active scheduled agent runs. Args: none.
- weather: Get current weather using GPS or a city. Args: optional location or city. Use when the user asks weather, temperature, rain, snow, wind, forecast now, or conditions.
